content: Deploy to prod via PR merge to main, NOT via 'vercel deploy --prod'. The Vercel GitHub integration auto-deploys on push to main. Skipping the PR loses the audit trail and skirts review. Use vercel deploy only for ad-hoc previews.

Every branch pushed to origin gets a unique Vercel Preview deploy at promptionary-git-<branch>-tehreets-projects.vercel.app (Vercel slugifies long branch names). scripts/agent-verify.sh polls the Vercel API for the deployment matching the current commit's githubCommitSha, waits for state=READY, then runs Playwright e2e against it. This is the project merge gate.
